name: Jobmaxxing Hermes Layer
description: A focused Hermes overlay for job-search orchestration, document-grounded writing, safe browser planning, and hiring-process workflows.

mcpServers.purpose: Local Jobmaxxing jobs, documents, writing, interview, browser, and activity tools.

recommendedHermesToolsets.purpose: Spawn and coordinate specialized job-search workers.
Research and prepare application fields with human approval gates.
Read local documents explicitly selected by the user.
Inspect proof repositories and keep Jobmaxxing/Hermes sources current.
Import resumes, work samples, offer docs, and interview prep docs when authorized.
Edit CVs, letters, and notes when authorized.
Read and draft recruiting email workflows when authorized.
Schedule interviews and follow-ups when authorized.
Read or update application trackers when authorized.
Prepare portfolio or interview decks when authorized.
Deliver Hermes chat updates and alert workflows when configured.
Use Office, Outlook, Word, or OneDrive workflows when authorized.
Inspect design proof and portfolio assets when authorized.
Inspect deployment proof, service URLs, and app status when authorized.
Inspect model, dataset, Space, and paper proof when authorized.
Read or write job-search notes and CRM records when authorized.
Track job-search work as product-style tasks when authorized.

skills.purpose: Top-level Hermes operating policy for Jobmaxxing.

documents.policy: Documents are indexed locally and linked into prompts by explicit reference. Do not paste entire documents into context unless the task needs it.
